title: Implement semver comparison
prompt: Create semver.mjs exporting compare(a, b) for plain x.y.z versions: returns 1 if a>b, -1 if a<b, 0 if equal. Compare numerically per segment ('1.2.10' > '1.2.9').

grade.command: node -e "import('./semver.mjs').then(m=>{if(m.compare('1.2.10','1.2.9')!==1)throw new Error('a');if(m.compare('1.0.0','1.0.1')!==-1)throw new Error('b');if(m.compare('2.0.0','2.0.0')!==0)throw new Error('c');if(m.compare('0.10.0','0.9.9')!==1)throw new Error('d');console.log('ok')})"
